workflow.name: Whole-Document Delegated Supervisor Pilot
workflow.description: P92 graph template for delegating one complete public technical document to a local document metadata extraction supervisor with compact coordinator validation.

nodes.name: Select one bounded document
nodes.description: Coordinator selects exactly one public document package and verifies source provenance, ignored runtime text, stop rules, and public-safety boundaries.

nodes.name: Materialize whole-document supervisor ticket
nodes.description: Script writes one ignored runtime ticket containing full source text plus tracked sanitized manifest, gate, report contract, and ROI estimate.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: May write raw source text only under ignored runtime paths.

nodes.name: Run delegated document metadata supervisor
nodes.description: Local supervisor receives the whole document and writes one compact JSON report with candidate records, confidence bins, gaps, self-grade, and next action.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: May use full local tools for source inspection, search, bounded validation, subagent audit, and writing the assigned runtime report. May not edit tracked files, create commits, or mutate GitHub state.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: local worker/provider tokens plus coordinator launch span

nodes.name: Validate supervisor report
nodes.description: Deterministic validator checks report shape, role, final signal, candidate count, record fields, confidence bins, and decision hint.

outputs.validation_report: ignored or tracked sanitized validation result

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Format and minimum-quality gate only; semantic acceptance remains coordinator-owned.

nodes.name: Bounce once or audit seed
nodes.description: Coordinator inspects the compact validation result and either audits the seed, issues one compact bounce ticket, or stops.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: One bounce maximum; final tracked decision remains coordinator-owned.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: required supervisor-token span for economics claims
